# yodatoshi

> builder of small tools and strange ideas. writes code at odd hours. ships when it feels right. drawn to the edges — where systems break and become something new.

## About

yodatoshi is an independent developer focused on building small, sharp tools and exploring ideas at the edges of systems.

## Projects

- **vallley** — job board built for startup founders and early-stage teams
- **dott** — fast CLI for domain availability search, no registrar middlemen
- **lucy** — personal macOS music player built on Spotify

## Contact

- Website: https://yodatoshi.com
